concerns.text: FR-015 mandates a 'manual audit' to estimate heuristic accuracy and 'report the observed accuracy rate'. Task T017 only implements a 'manual audit sample generator' (random selection). There is no task to perform the actual manual audit (human review of the sample) or to calculate/report the resulting accuracy metric, leaving FR-015 and SC-009 unimplementable.

Success Criteria SC-009 requires measuring heuristic accuracy against a manual audit. The current tasks only generate the sample for the audit (T017) but lack the task to execute the audit and compute the metric, creating a gap between the success definition and the implementation plan.
